member.name: P:Foundatio.Xunit.TestLoggerBase.TestCancellationToken
member.summary:
Gets a cancellation token that is cancelled when the current test completes or when the test run is aborted/timed out. Pass this token to
and other async operations to ensure automatic cleanup between tests.

remarks.para: This token is linked to TestContext.Current.CancellationToken, so it triggers on both per-test disposal (via ) and run-level abort or timeout. xUnit creates a new class instance per [Fact], so each test gets a fresh linked token.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Xunit.TestLoggerOptions.MinimumLogLevel
member.summary: The minimum log level for the logging system. Anything below this level will not be processed and will not be written to the output even if a specific category has a lower log level set.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Xunit.TestWithLoggingBase.TestCancellationToken
member.summary:
Gets a cancellation token that is cancelled when the current test completes or when the test run is aborted/timed out. Pass this token to
and other async operations to ensure automatic cleanup between tests.

remarks.para: This token is linked to TestContext.Current.CancellationToken, so it triggers on both per-test disposal (via ) and run-level abort or timeout. xUnit creates a new class instance per [Fact], so each test gets a fresh linked token.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Xunit.DelayedMessageBus
member.summary: Used to capture messages to potentially be forwarded later. Messages are forwarded by calling .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Xunit.DelayedMessageBus.Flush
member.summary: Flushes all queued messages to the inner message bus.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Xunit.RetryFactAttribute
member.summary: Works just like [Fact] except that failures are retried (by default, 3 times).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Xunit.RetryFactAttribute.MaxRetries
member.summary: Number of retries allowed for a failed test. If unset (or set less than 1), will default to 3 attempts.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Xunit.RetryTheoryAttribute
member.summary: Works just like [Theory] except that failures are retried (by default, 3 times).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Xunit.RetryTheoryAttribute.MaxRetries
member.summary: Number of retries allowed for a failed test. If unset (or set less than 1), will default to 3 attempts.
